description_long: This is a life-sized zebra-patterned horse with a realistic body shape, featuring a distinct black and white striped coat. The head is elongated with upright ears and a pronounced muzzle, while the mane is short and follows the natural curve of the neck. The legs are slender and proportionate, with visible joints and hooves, and the tail is short and tufted. The body is muscular, with a slightly arched back and a rounded hindquarter. The surface appears matte and hard, resembling the texture of a real horse's hide. There are no visible accessories, tack, or equipment on the horse.
description: A realistic, zebra-striped horse with a muscular build, upright ears, and a short, natural mane. The surface is matte and hard, with no visible tack or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horse's face, upright ears, and the symmetry of the black and white stripes on the head and chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body profile, the natural curve of the neck, and the detailed striping along the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded hindquarters, tail, and the continuation of the striped pattern down the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite body profile, with similar striping and the natural stance of the legs.
attribute_pose: The horse is depicted in a walking gait with a natural, forward-moving posture.
attribute_mane_style: The mane is short and follows the natural curve of the neck.
attribute_leg_position: The front left leg and rear right leg are lifted, indicating a walking motion, while the other two legs bear weight.
